name: Stripe
description: Interact with the Stripe API for payments and customers
author: awaitstep

action.label: Action
action.description: The Stripe API action to perform.

amount.label: Amount
amount.description: Amount in smallest currency unit (cents). Used by: Create Payment Intent, Create Charge.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: Three-letter ISO currency code. Used by: Create Payment Intent, Create Charge.

customerId.label: Customer ID
customerId.description: Stripe customer ID. Used by: Retrieve Customer, Create Charge.

paymentIntentId.label: Payment Intent ID
paymentIntentId.description: Payment intent ID. Used by: Retrieve Payment Intent.

chargeId.label: Charge ID
chargeId.description: Charge ID. Used by: Create Refund.

email.label: Email
email.description: Customer email. Used by: Create Customer.

name.label: Name
name.description: Customer name. Used by: Create Customer.

description.label: Description
description.description: Description for the resource being created.

metadata.label: Metadata
metadata.description: Key-value pairs to attach to the Stripe object.
